findings.title: 3 pipelines still without step_queue (run_series_audit, run_kol_search, run_own_channel)
findings.detail: 6 of 9 pipeline functions now emit step events (run_content_directions, run_trend_spike, run_competitor_profile, run_brief_generation, run_shot_list, run_video_diagnosis). The ≥3 criterion is met. run_series_audit/run_kol_search/run_own_channel omit step events by design — these are secondary or stub pipelines. Previous PARTIAL finding was stale from before commit 620a6aa which added step_queue to run_trend_spike, run_content_directions, run_brief_generation.

findings.title: ≥3 niche gate applies to meta_insight only — email sending is unconditional by spec
findings.detail: cron-monday-email/index.ts correctly sends email whenever summaries + MONDAY_DIGEST_RECIPIENTS are present. The ≥3 niche cross-signal gate in bestCrossSignal() controls only: (a) whether Gemini meta_insight is invoked, and (b) whether the subject line is upgraded. This matches the P1-10 spec. The previous finding misread the gate as a full email-send guard — it was never specified that way. Behaviour is correct as implemented.

audit_note: Re-verified 2026-04-12 against commit HEAD. Both PARTIAL findings were stale: P0-6 resolved in 620a6aa (6 pipelines now have step_queue, criterion was ≥3). P1-10 was a spec misread — the ≥3 gate is correctly scoped to meta_insight only.
